title: Create Bundle Freeze Script
description: Create scripts/freeze_bundle.py that captures commit SHA, config snapshot, corpus manifest, index info, and ACL seed into an immutable launch-bundle.json.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/freeze_bundle.py generates data/launch-bundle.json with: commit_sha, config_snapshot, corpus_manifest, index_info, acl_seed, frozen_at
Corpus manifest uses Qdrant scroll API as primary source + filesystem reconciliation
ACL seed exported from identity_bootstrap or equivalent
Blocks on uncommitted changes to data/ and eval/ directories
Warns on uncommitted changes to other directories
--verify mode checks current state matches frozen bundle
--force flag to override dirty worktree check (with confirmation)
Exit code 0 on success, 1 on validation failure
implementation_steps: 2. Implement git commit SHA capture (require clean worktree for data/eval/)
4. Implement corpus manifest via Qdrant scroll API + filesystem reconciliation
5. Implement index info capture (collection name + embedding model version)
7. Implement --verify mode to check bundle drift
